101.reason: The loop condition `cmp!=NULL` combined with the logic inside causes an infinite loop or incorrect traversal when inserting. Specifically, if `q->pow` is smaller than all existing powers, `cmp` advances to NULL, but the code doesn't handle insertion at the end correctly outside this loop structure properly for all cases, and more critically, `cmp` is not reset to `multi_head` for each new `q`. This leads to O(N^3) behavior or logical errors because `cmp` keeps advancing from its previous position instead of starting from the head for each new term insertion.

reasons.buggy-deepseek-reasoner-2: 0.5 , reason:  [cmp未重置为multi_head，导致后续插入位置错误，可能引起死循环]

Specifically, if `q->pow` is smaller than all existing powers, `cmp` advances to NULL, but the code doesn't handle insertion at the end correctly outside this loop structure properly for all cases, and more critically, `cmp` is not reset to `multi_head` for each new `q`. This leads to O(N^3) behavior or logical errors because `cmp` keeps advancing from its previous position instead of starting from the head for each new term insertion.
reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.5 , reason:  The variable 'cmp' is not reset to the head of the list for each new term 'q'. It continues from its previous position, causing incorrect insertion logic and potentially infinite loops or missed insertions, leading to logical errors and potential Time Limit Exceeded if the list becomes corrupted or extremely long due to failed merges. Furthermore, if the term needs to be inserted at the beginning (higher power than head), this logic fails completely as it only traverses forward from 'cmp'.
